name: Fore Axes
about: Fore Axes is a multi-venue experience combining a premier bar, axe throwing, and golf simulation. It operates on a per-person, per-hour basis with package options for private events and mobile services. The venue is designed for casual gatherings, corporate outings, and parties, featuring a bar and private event capabilities. It offers golf simulation alongside its primary axe throwing activities, providing a unique entertainment hybrid.
why_golfers_like_it: Unique hybrid venue offering golf simulation alongside other entertainment
Full bar service available for a complete experience
Suitable for groups and private events
Provides a casual, social environment for play

food_and_drink.notes: Food must be kept on tables, not in simulator bays

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Not specified; golf shoes can be worn but metal spikes are not allowed

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks must be kept on your table and not in the simulator bays

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Not specified; each experience is 1 hour long

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, children under 12 are not permitted to participate in any experiences
